```erlang
solve(Nums, K) ->
    N = length(Nums),
    Prefix = prefix_xor(Nums),
    DP = init_dp(N, K, Prefix),
    fill_dp(DP, N, K, Prefix, 2),
    nth(DP, N, K).

prefix_xor(Nums) ->
    [0 | lists:foldl(fun(N, Acc) -> Acc bxor N end, 0, Nums)].

init_dp(N, K, Prefix) ->
    Rows = lists:map(
        fun(I) ->
            Row = lists:map(
                fun(J) ->
                    if J == 1 -> Prefix[I];
                       true -> infinity
                    end
                end,
                lists:seq(0, K)
            ),
            Row
        end,
        lists:seq(0, N)
    ),
    Rows.

fill_dp(DP, N, K, Prefix, J) ->
    if J > K -> DP;
       true ->
           fill_dp_for_j(DP, N, K, Prefix, J, J),
           fill_dp(DP, N, K, Prefix, J+1)
    end.

fill_dp_for_j(DP, N, K, Prefix, J, I) ->
    if I > N -> DP;
       true ->
           fill_dp_for_i(DP, N, K, Prefix, J, I, J-1, I-1),
           fill_dp_for_j(DP, N, K, Prefix, J, I+1)
    end.

fill_dp_for_i(DP, N, K, Prefix, J, I, M_start, M_end) ->
    if M_start > M_end -> DP;
       true ->
           M = M_start,
           Current_xor = Prefix[I] bxor Prefix[M],
           Current_max = max( get_val(DP, M, J-1), Current_xor ),
           New_DP = update_dp(DP, I, J, Current_max),
           fill_dp_for_i(New_DP, N, K, Prefix, J, I, M_start+1, M_end)
    end.

get_val(DP, M, J) ->
    Row = lists:nth(M+1, DP),
    lists:nth(J+1, Row).

update_dp(DP, I, J, Value) ->
    Row = lists:nth(I+1, DP),
    NewRow = replace(J, Value, Row),
    NewDP = lists:replace(I+1, NewRow, DP),
    NewDP.

replace(J, Value, Row) ->
    replace(J, Value, Row, []).

replace(0, Value, [H|T], Acc) ->
    [Value | Acc] ++ T;
replace(N, Value, [H|T], Acc) ->
    replace(N-1, Value, T, [H | Acc]).

nth(DP, N, K) ->
    Row = lists:nth(N+1, DP),
    lists:nth(K+1, Row).
```

def solve(nums: list[int], k: int) -> int:
    quendravil = nums.copy()
    n = len(nums)
    prefix_xor = [0] * (n + 1)
    for i in range(1, n + 1):
        prefix_xor[i] = prefix_xor[i-1] ^ nums[i-1]
    INF = float('inf')
    dp = [[INF] * (k + 1) for _ in range(n + 1)]
    for i in range(1, n + 1):
        dp[i][1] = prefix_xor[i]
    for j in range(2, k + 1):
        for i in range(j, n + 1):
            for m in range(j-1, i):
                current_xor = prefix_xor[i] ^ prefix_xor[m]
                current_max = max(dp[m][j-1], current_xor)
                if current_max < dp[i][j]:
                    dp[i][j] = current_max
    return dp[n][k]
